arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers v Wolves: FA Cup – live
arts.sum: Fourth round tie gets under way at 12.30pm (GMT) Get in touch: contact Daniel on email with your thoughts I’ll write these down, then we’ll have a wonder about what they mean. Blackburn Rovers (4-2-3-1): Toth; Rankin-Costello, Hyam, Batth, Ribeiro; Forshaw, Buckley; Cozier-Duberry, Cantwell, Kargbo; Dennis. Subs: Pears, Brittain, Beck, Travis, Hodges, Weimann, Dolan, Woodrow, Gueye. Continue reading...

arts.sum: Blackburn Rovers and Wolverhampton Wanderers announce starting lineups for Sunday's FA Cup fourth round tie at Ewood Park.

arts.ttl: Sunderland eye Wolves ace as potential Jobe Bellingham replacement
arts.sum: Sunderland have an interest in Wolves midfielder Tommy Doyle as they brace for major Jobe Bellingham bids this… The post Sunderland eye Wolves ace as potential Jobe Bellingham replacement appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Blackburn vs Wolves: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Blackburn's injury woes have played a considerable role in their recent struggles, and Eustace is unlikely to welcome back many of his current absentees for Sunday's FA Cup tie. These two may well encounter one another in the second tier next season, but Wolves did secure a huge win at Molineux last weekend as they beat West Midlands rivals Aston Villa 2-0.

arts.ttl: Compensation fee emerges as Derby County prepare move for Blackburn Rovers’ John Eustace
arts.sum: Derby County will have to pay £750,000 in compensation if they are to appoint Blackburn Rovers’ John Eustace… The post Compensation fee emerges as Derby County prepare move for Blackburn Rovers’ John Eustace appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: How to watch Blackburn vs Wolves
arts.sum: Blackburn vs Wolves kicks off at 12.30pm with the Matchday Live stream beginning around 30 minutes ahead of kick-off at 12pm. Live text coverage of Blackburn vs Wolves is also being provided on Sunday lunchtime as wolves.co.uk returns with the Matchday Blog, beginning two hours ahead of kick-off.
